title: Inbox Triage and Reply Drafts for Consulting Firms
metaDescription: Done-for-you inbox triage and reply drafts for consulting firms. Sorted threads, drafted responses in your voice, and a clear daily queue ready to send.
excerpt: Your inbox sorted, prioritized, and pre-drafted in your voice every morning. Consulting firms reclaim hours and keep clients answered without living in email.

sections.intro:
If you run a consulting firm, your inbox is the work and the bottleneck. Prospect inquiries, scope questions, status pings from active clients, invoice queries, intro requests, and recruiter noise all land in the same place. Partners and senior consultants spend the first 60 to 90 minutes of every day triaging instead of advising, and replies that need real thought get pushed to the evening.

The Ayothedoc AI Operating System handles inbox triage and reply drafting as a done-for-you capability. Every morning your inbox is sorted by intent and urgency, and the threads that need a response have a draft waiting in your voice, with the right context already pulled in. You read, adjust if needed, and send. The system runs whether you open your laptop or not.
sections.fourCFit:
This page covers the Capabilities layer of your AIOS. Inbox triage and reply drafts is one of the standard workflows we install. It only works because the other three layers are in place:

  • Context: the system knows your service lines, your typical scope language, your partners, your active clients, and how you talk.
  • Connections: it reads from your mailbox, your CRM, your calendar, and your document store so drafts reference real engagement details, not guesses.
  • Capabilities: the triage rules, draft generation, and queueing logic that turn raw email into a clean morning queue.
  • Cadence: it runs on a schedule, typically every 15 minutes during work hours and a full sweep before your day starts.

If you want the entry point first, the free 60-Second Lead Engine covers new inbound leads. This capability extends the same idea to your full inbox.
sections.whatDoneLooksLike:
The artifact is a sorted inbox plus a draft queue, delivered on a tight SLA.

  • Every inbound email is classified within 5 minutes into categories such as new lead, active client, internal, vendor, billing, recruiter, or noise.
  • Threads needing a reply get a draft written in your voice, saved directly in the email thread as a draft, never auto-sent.
  • Drafts pull live context: engagement name, last meeting date, open deliverables, invoice status, and any relevant prior thread.
  • A morning brief lands by 7am with counts, the top 5 threads that need a partner decision, and anything flagged urgent overnight.
  • Sensitive senders (current clients, key referral sources, named partners) are always escalated, never auto-categorized as noise.
  • You and your team keep full control. Nothing leaves your domain without a human pressing send.
sections.howWeInstall:
We install this capability in three phases. No long discovery, no slideware.

  1. Audit, free, about 10 minutes. We look at a sample of your inbox patterns, your service lines, and the categories that actually matter for your firm. Run the audit.
  2. Install, 10 business days. We wire the Connections, load your Context (voice samples, service descriptions, client list), build the triage rules, and tune draft quality on a sample of real threads with you in the loop.
  3. Operate, ongoing. The capability runs on Cadence. We add one new automation per week, refine categories as your firm changes, and review draft quality monthly. See plans.
sections.expectedResults:
• Most consulting firms recover 8 to 15 hours per partner per week once triage and drafts are stable, usually within the first 30 days.
  • First-response times on client questions drop from hours to minutes, because a draft is already waiting when you open the thread.
  • Evening and weekend email work drops noticeably. Partners stop catching up on the inbox after dinner.
  • Draft acceptance rates typically reach 70 to 85 percent after the first two weeks of tuning, meaning most drafts go out with minor edits or no edits at all.
  • Guarantee: we recover 40 or more hours a month for your firm or we keep working free until we do.
sections.faq:
Will the drafts actually sound like us?

Yes. During install we load voice samples from each partner who wants their own drafting style. The system writes in that voice, not a generic template. You can adjust phrasing at any time and the system learns from your edits.

What about confidential client matters?

Nothing is auto-sent. Drafts stay inside your email system as normal drafts, visible only to the account owner. Sensitive senders and matters can be excluded entirely. You own the system and the data stays in your environment.

Do we have to change our email tools?

No. The capability is tool-agnostic and works with the mailbox, CRM, and calendar you already use. We connect to what you have rather than asking you to migrate.
